description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence set within a landscaped property, surrounded by a dense perimeter of tall trees that provide privacy and a natural barrier. The main building features a low-pitched, dark gable roof and is complemented by a spacious driveway and parking area lined with trees. The front facade includes a prominent entrance, flanked by large windows and a covered porch area. The backyard boasts a rectangular swimming pool, visible from the rear, and additional garden features such as shrubs and a small gazebo. The property is enclosed by a well-maintained hedge and tree line, with paved walkways and driveways connecting the entrance to the street. The overall design emphasizes symmetry, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern bungalow with a gable roof, surrounded by dense trees, a driveway, and a backyard pool, featuring large windows and a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical tree-lined driveway, and the covered porch with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated driveway, tree barrier, and partial view of the pool and garden structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard swimming pool, rear facade of the bungalow, and the dense tree enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side garden, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor features.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
